entries.definition:
sh-ḥ-m fat, to be or become fat, to feed; ear lobe; inner part, essence. Of this root, only شحوم shuḥūm occurs once in the Qurʾan.
شُحُوم shuḥūm [pl. of شَحْم shaḥm] fat (6:146) وَمِنَ الْبَقَرِ وَالْغَنَمِ حَرَّمْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ شُحُومَهُمَا We forbade to them [the Jews] the fat of the cattle and sheep.

شُحُوم shuḥūm [pl. of شَحْم shaḥm] fat (6:146) وَمِنَ الْبَقَرِ وَالْغَنَمِ حَرَّمْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ شُحُومَهُمَا We forbade to them [the Jews] the fat of the cattle and sheep.
